name: read_file
description: Read a file from the workspace. Returns the file content, truncated if very large; the result reports total_lines and, when truncated, the offset to continue from. Use offset/limit to page through a file larger than the line cap. Images (png/jpeg/gif/webp) and PDFs are supported: their content is attached to the conversation so you can see and analyze it directly (capped at 5MB).

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root.

offset.description: 1-based line number to start reading from. Omit to start at the top.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to return from the offset. Omit for the default cap.
